ISO IEC 42006 Control Item(s): Certification body governance, impartiality, competence, process, and management-system requirements for ISO/IEC 42001 audits.
rationale: ARISE standards governance supports mapping audit and certification criteria into the control environment.

ISO IEC 42006 Control Item(s): Audit planning, assessment, evidence review, certification decisions, surveillance, and recertification.
rationale: ARISE verification maps to evidence testing and certification readiness activities.

ISO IEC 42006 Control Item(s): Auditor, certification personnel, and AIMS role competence requirements.
rationale: ARISE training maps to competence records required for audit and assurance roles.

ISO IEC 42006 Control Item(s): Nonconformity handling, corrective action, complaint handling, and follow-up.
rationale: ARISE incident management maps to issue handling and corrective action closure in certification programs.
